systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.default: You are a consultative sales assistant. Help the customer understand their problem and guide them toward a solution through natural conversation.

messageWindowSize.title: Message Window Size
messageWindowSize.description: Number of recent messages sent to the LLM for context. Lower values reduce cost; higher values improve context awareness.

recursionLimit.title: Recursion Limit
recursionLimit.description: Maximum number of graph iterations (tool call loops)

crm.title: CRM Integration
crm.description: Configure contact synchronization with CRM. Enable one provider and fill in its credentials.

lookupBy.title: Contact Lookup Field
lookupBy.description: Which field to use for finding existing contacts

enrichmentAgent.title: Enrichment Agent
enrichmentAgent.description: Agent to call for lead enrichment on the first message (async, fire-and-forget). The agent receives contact data and can enrich it in the CRM.

qualificationFields.title: Qualification Fields
qualificationFields.description: Fields to collect from the customer during conversation. The AI collects them naturally — no fixed order. Leave empty for free-form conversation.

name.title: Field Name
name.description: CRM field name (e.g. companyName, budget, painPoints)

description.title: Description
description.description: What this field represents — guides the AI on how to ask

required.title: Required
required.description: Whether this field must be collected

extractionModel.title: Extraction Model
extractionModel.description: Cheap/fast model used to extract qualification data from conversation and sync to CRM. If not set, extraction is disabled.

contactFieldsWhitelist.title: Contact Fields Whitelist
contactFieldsWhitelist.description: CRM contact fields visible to the AI in the system prompt. Only whitelisted fields are shared — all others are hidden. Leave empty to use defaults (name, company, industry, role).

inputSanitization.title: Input Sanitization
inputSanitization.description: Check user messages for prompt injection before LLM processing. Requires a moderation model from the catalog.
